script:
set +e

migrate() {
  SHORT="$1"
  LU="$2"
  echo "=================="
  echo "== Migrate $SHORT (linux user: $LU) =="
  echo "=================="

  # 1. Create user + add to azureuser group for shared CLI
  if id "$LU" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  user exists"
  else
    sudo useradd -m -s /bin/bash "$LU" && echo "  created"
  fi
  sudo usermod -a -G azureuser "$LU"
  sudo -u "$LU" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude "/home/$LU/.claude" 2>/dev/null
  sudo -u "$LU" ln -sfn /home/azureuser/.claude.json "/home/$LU/.claude.json" 2>/dev/null
  sudo cp -r /home/azureuser/.azure "/home/$LU/.azure" 2>/dev/null
  sudo chown -R "$LU:$LU" "/home/$LU/.azure" 2>/dev/null

  # 2. Stop services
  sudo systemctl stop "${SHORT}-bot.service" "${SHORT}-responder.service" 2>/dev/null

  # 3. Get existing PORT before rewriting unit
  PORT=$(sudo grep -oE 'PORT=[0-9]+' "/etc/systemd/system/${SHORT}-bot.service" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d= -f2)
  echo "  PORT=$PORT"

  # 4. Move bot files
  for f in "${SHORT}-bot.py" "${SHORT}-responder.py" "${SHORT}-graph-token.sh" "${SHORT}-send-to.sh" "${SHORT}-remember.sh" "${SHORT}-install-chat-app.sh" "${SHORT}-pinned.sh" "${SHORT}-download.sh"; do
    [ -f "/home/azureuser/$f" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/$f" "/home/$LU/"
  done
  [ -d "/home/azureuser/.${SHORT}-bot" ] && sudo mv "/home/azureuser/.${SHORT}-bot" "/home/$LU/"
  [ -d "/home/azureuser/${SHORT}-teams-app" ] && sudo cp -r "/home/azureuser/${SHORT}-teams-app" "/home/$LU/"

  # 5. Sed-replace paths
  for f in "/home/$LU/${SHORT}-bot.py" "/home/$LU/${SHORT}-responder.py" /home/$LU/${SHORT}-*.sh; do
    [ -f "$f" ] && sudo sed -i "s|/home/azureuser/\.${SHORT}-bot|/home/$LU/.${SHORT}-bot|g; s|/home/azureuser/${SHORT}-|/home/$LU/${SHORT}-|g" "$f"
  done

  # 6. Chown
  sudo chown -R "$LU:$LU" "/home/$LU/${SHORT}-bot.py" "/home/$LU/${SHORT}-responder.py" /home/$LU/${SHORT}-*.sh "/home/$LU/.${SHORT}-bot" "/home/$LU/${SHORT}-teams-app" 2>/dev/null
  sudo chmod 600 "/home/$LU/.${SHORT}-bot/creds.json" 2>/dev/null

  # 7. Write new systemd units
  for unit in "${SHORT}-bot" "${SHORT}-responder"; do
    UF="/etc/systemd/system/${unit}.service"
    sudo tee "$UF" > /dev/null <<UNIT
[Unit]
Description=${unit} (per-user Linux account: ${LU})
After=network-online.target $(if [ "$unit" = "${SHORT}-responder" ]; then echo "${SHORT}-bot.service"; fi)
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User=${LU}
WorkingDirectory=/home/${LU}
Environment=HOME=/home/${LU}
Environment=PATH=/home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
$(if [ "$unit" = "${SHORT}-bot" ]; then echo "Environment=PORT=${PORT}"; fi)
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /home/${LU}/${unit}.py
Restart=always
RestartSec=5

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
UNIT
  done
  sudo systemctl daemon-reload

  # 8. Start
  sudo systemctl start "${SHORT}-bot.service" "${SHORT}-responder.service"
  sleep 3
  echo "  bot=$(systemctl is-active ${SHORT}-bot.service) responder=$(systemctl is-active ${SHORT}-responder.service)"
  echo
}

migrate "ashley" "ashley"
migrate "cameron" "cameron"
migrate "david" "david"
migrate "emily-claude" "emily"
migrate "gabriel" "gabriel"
migrate "jesus-reyes" "jesusr"
migrate "neil" "neil"
migrate "neil-claude" "neilc"
migrate "rosi" "rosi"
migrate "stephanie-claude" "stephanie"
migrate "zahid" "zahid"

echo
echo "=== FINAL AUDIT ==="
for s in ashley cameron david emily-claude gabriel jesus-reyes neil neil-claude rosi stephanie-claude zahid; do
  U=$(systemctl show "${s}-bot.service" -p User --value)
  A=$(systemctl is-active "${s}-bot.service")
  echo "  $s: user=$U bot=$A"
done
